name: circuit-skill
description: Textbook-grounded circuit analysis skills for Chinese postgraduate entrance exam preparation.

interface.shortDescription: Textbook-grounded circuit analysis and exam review.
interface.longDescription: Solve circuit-analysis problems from a local textbook scan, recognize and redraw schematics, and finish every answer with concepts, patterns, pitfalls, and exam checks.
defaultPrompt: 请优先依据教材解答这道电路题，并列出知识点与考点。
识别这张电路图，核对拓扑后再求解。
把这个电路描述绘制成清晰的 SVG 电路图。
